title: Fuller's Pokecenters
description: Adds Custom Cobblemon Pokecenters to Vanilla Villages
body:
This Mod adds Custom Cobblemon Pokecenters to Vanilla Villages!

Each Pokecenter features a single Healing Machine and PC.
On average, most villages should have at least one Pokecenter. Desert Villages currently have the highest chances for multiple to spawn due to how flat the desert is.

Depends on Cobblemon and Structurized Reborn!

For a 24/7 server, please consider using code "GVERSE" through [Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/gverse) for 25% OFF. Supporting me means more cool minecraft creations like this one!
